_meta.author: Nayem Hasan
_meta.description: Remote config for ShiftController extension. Controls all visual, behavioral, and kill-switch settings.
_meta.notes: Upload this file to https://nayem.net/shiftcontroller/config.json — extension fetches and caches it every hour. Change kill_switch.active to true to remotely disable all instances. Version: 0.0.0.1
_meta._example_meta: This metadata section contains schema info and deployment details. Use config_url to keep extension synchronized.

kill_switch._active_comment: EXAMPLE: Set to true to disable all extension instances globally. Example: {'active': true, 'mode': 'brick'}
kill_switch._mode_comment: Control deactivation behavior. Options: 'silent' (no UI), 'message' (show message), 'brick' (permanent disable). Example: 'message'
kill_switch.message: ShiftController has been discontinued. Thank you for using it.
kill_switch._message_comment: Custom message shown when mode='message'. Example: 'Service will be unavailable for maintenance on 2026-05-15'
kill_switch.brick_message: This copy of ShiftController is no longer authorized. The extension has been permanently disabled.
kill_switch._brick_message_comment: Message shown when mode='brick'. This is irreversible. Example for licensing: 'License expired. Please renew at admin.shiftcontroller.com'
kill_switch._redirect_url_comment: Optional URL to redirect users when extension is killed. Example: 'https://shiftcontroller.nayem.net/discontinued'
kill_switch._wipe_data_comment: If true, clears all user shortcuts from localStorage when killed. Example usage: {'active': true, 'wipe_data': true} for GDPR compliance
kill_switch._disable_content_scripts_comment: If true, stops content scripts from running on web pages. Prevents further data collection. Example: Set to true for privacy mode.

branding._company_name_comment: Brand name displayed in UI. Example: 'MyCompany Shortcuts' or 'AutoBot Pro'
branding._company_name_split_note: Character index to split name into two spans: 'Shift' + 'Controller'. Second part gets accent color. Example: Split at 5 creates 'Shift' (base) + 'Controller' (accent).
branding.company_tagline: Record any clickable element. Map it to a keyboard shortcut.
branding._tagline_comment: Subtitle shown under brand name. Example: 'Automate your workflow in seconds' or 'Smart shortcuts for power users'
branding._author_comment: Creator attribution. Example author_name: 'Built by TechTeam' or 'By Acme Corp'
branding._show_author_comment: Toggle author credit display at bottom of popup. EXAMPLE FALSE: {'show_author': false} to hide completely
branding._logo_type_comment: Icon style. 'builtin_*' uses built-in SVG. 'url' loads from logo_url. 'svg_inline' uses logo_svg_string. EXAMPLE: {'logo_type': 'builtin_shield'} for security theme
branding._logo_url_comment: External image URL when logo_type='url'. Example: 'https://cdn.example.com/logo-64px.png'
branding._support_email_comment: Support contact email. Example: 'support@company.com' — displayed in dashboard footer

theme._preset_note: If preset is 'custom' or any individual color field is non-empty, those values override the preset. Preset is the fallback.
theme._sharp_mode_note: If true, overrides border_radius to 0px everywhere. Creates hard engineering aesthetic.
theme._accent_square_decorations_note: Adds tiny 6x6 accent-colored squares before section headers for editorial effect.
theme._custom_css_note: Optional raw CSS injected after all theme variables. Use sparingly. Must be CSP-safe (no external URLs).

typography._font_url_note: Injected as a <link> in document <head> at runtime. Leave empty to use system fonts.

layout._shadow_note: Used only for floating/elevated elements. Not for flat content.

animations._skeleton_timeout_note: Max ms to show skeleton loader before forcing UI render with defaults.

features._show_shortcut_hints_note: Shows 'Start Record: shift+s | Stop: ESC' strip below record button. EXAMPLE: {'show_shortcut_hints': false} to hide for cleaner UI
features._domain_toggle_comment: Displays on/off toggle for current domain. EXAMPLE: Set false to always enable extension on all sites
features._show_analytics_note: Shows click-saved counter in UI. Data stays local. EXAMPLE: {'show_analytics': true} for productivity metrics
features._dev_panel_comment: Enables developer/profile page access. EXAMPLE: Set false to simplify UI for non-technical users
features._consent_required_note: Shows privacy consent overlay on first launch. EXAMPLE: {'consent_required': false} to skip for fully automated deployment
features._record_hotkey_comment: Keyboard shortcut to start recording. EXAMPLE OPTIONS: 'ctrl+shift+r', 'alt+w', 'meta+shift+a'
features._stop_hotkey_comment: Keyboard shortcut to stop recording/close inspector. EXAMPLE OPTIONS: 'Escape', 'x', 'ctrl+shift+c'
features._dashboard_comment: Enable full dashboard (Key Map, Domains, Defaults views). EXAMPLE: false to show only popup
features._max_shortcuts_comment: Maximum shortcuts allowed per domain. EXAMPLE: {'max_shortcuts_per_domain': 100} for power users
features._allow_global_shortcuts_note: If false, shortcuts are domain-scoped only. No cross-site shortcuts. EXAMPLE: {'allow_global_shortcuts': false} for security
features._auto_purge_comment: Automatically delete old shortcuts based on interval
features._auto_purge_interval_comment: Purge shortcuts older than N hours. EXAMPLE: {'auto_purge_interval_hours': 720} purges after 30 days

remote_behavior._config_cache_ttl_note: How long to cache this config locally before re-fetching. Default 1 hour.
remote_behavior._config_fetch_on_popup_open_note: If true, always re-fetches when popup opens (uses more bandwidth). Recommended false.
remote_behavior._version_check_url_note: Optional URL to check for extension updates. Leave empty to disable.
remote_behavior._telemetry_note: No telemetry is ever sent regardless of this value. Reserved for future opt-in analytics.
remote_behavior._fallback_note: If fetch fails, use stale cached config instead of defaults. Recommended true.

copy._note: All user-facing copy strings. Override defaults here.
copy.consent_body: ShiftController captures keyboard and mouse input to create automation macros. Your data is encrypted locally and never leaves your device. By continuing, you consent to this local data collection.
